category_sources: source_facts.description says this is an automatic documentation generator for modern Fortran programs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Fortran-FOSS-Programmers/ford project; acronym branding is FORD.
docs_sources: The official project publishes documentation on Read the Docs; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a documentation generator for Fortran; source_facts.executables lists ford.
